pageContext.name: Hermione Granger Polyjuice
pageContext.description: Sideshow and Iron Studios are proud to announce the latest from the Art Scale 1:10 line - Hermione Granger Polyjuice! The Hermione Granger Polyjuice Art Scale Statue is a limited edition Harry Potter collectible and comes with a detailed hand-painted base.  Harry Potter fans, don't miss your chance to add this Hermione Granger figure to your Harry Potter collection!
